This introduction and document history below are for internal use only. It is allowed to merge Chapter 1 with other service descriptions into a single service catalog. Modifying the content of Chapter 1 for individual clients is not allowed. (If necessary, any adjustments can only be made with approval from the responsible service owner of product manager.) Service summary: Cegeka provides <klant> with an Office 365 Back-up solution. The Cegeka Shared Backup is powered by Commvault. It includes data back-up of: Outlook 365, OneDrive for Business, SharePoint online and Microsoft Teams.  By implementing Cegeka Shared Backup:
Standard service components: Cegeka shall be responsible in providing backup service for the following Office 365 Services: * Fair use policy – see service description ** Fair use policy – see service description. Deleted files kept indefinitely *** In-place restores into Teams is not possible. (Microsoft limitation)
Eligibility and Prerequisites: Conditions Out of scope Responsibility matrix Activity Customer Cegeka Define backup scope R, A C, I Define requirements regarding backup policy and scope IC R, A Configure backup I R, A Provide access to self-service I R, A Integration between launcher and Intranet C,I R,A Manage and monitor backup I R,A Cross-functional services In order to guarantee the Service quality as specified in Cegeka provides the required Cross-Functional Services as specified in “Cross-Functional-Services.doc”
Order & billing information: Service SKUs Monthly SKU Unit OF MEASUREMEnt BASE SKUs – USER/MAILBOX * Office 365 Backup (one mailbox, one OneDrive, one SharePoint account, Teams) Per User Office 365 Backup – Teams Free** Office 365 Backup - additional mailboxes Per mailbox Office 365 Backup - additional OneDrives Per OneDrive Office 365 Backup - additional SharePoint accounts/mailboxes Per mailbox BASE SKUs - DATA Replicated backup in 10 GB cf. backup retentions, per 10 GiB on backup medium 10 GB/Month * mandatory SKU – at least 1 to be selected per subsection ** When O365 mailbox/User is already included in backup, otherwise additional per user cost Service Part number(s) O.0340_0010_0030_A_S.000 Replicated backup in 10 GB cf. backup retentions per 10 GiB on backup medium Measurement The pricing of the Service consists of a platform-based, user-based, image-based, server-based and optional Add-On SKU’s Calculation (“Price/Unit” x “Number of setups/platforms”) + (“Price/Unit” x “Number of users”) + (“Price/Unit” x “Number of images”) + (“Price/Unit” x “Number of servers”) + (“Price/Unit” x “Number of ADC pairs”).
